status_at_import: all enhanced content imported into data files (2026-04-21)
major_corrections_applied: Rhyme Finder now described as spelling-based, not phonetic.
cS-why-words-look-like-rhymes whenToUse note corrected: removed false 'Uses phonetic matching - catches true rhymes' claim.
cluster FAQ now states Rhyme Finder is spelling-based, matches trailing letter patterns.
Tool pages no longer claim slant-rhyme mode or per-result syllable counts that do not exist in ui_fields.
remaining_product_opportunities: Add a pronunciation dictionary or phoneme layer before claiming true perfect rhymes.
Add syllable counts beside rhyme results if the page wants to promise syllable-aware rhyme selection.
Add true slant-rhyme and multi-word rhyme features before describing them as tool modes.
Add live SERP/PAA collection fields if you want the FAQ set to be based on current search results rather than search-intent modeling.

rhyme-finder: Add a pronunciation dictionary or phoneme layer for true rhyme mode.
Add syllable counts alongside each rhyme result.
Add real slant-rhyme matching beyond trailing-letter grouping.
Add an eye-rhyme warning badge for high-risk spellings such as -ove, -ough, -ear, -ose.
syllable-counter: Add a manual override for individual word counts.
Add dictionary exceptions for common edge cases such as every, fire, poem, and family.
Add a compare-lines view for poems with target counts.
Add preset forms such as haiku, tanka, limerick, and common hymn meter.
Add a warning when a word is likely ambiguous.
haiku-checker: Add optional presets for tanka 5-7-5-7-7 and other short forms.
Add a revision helper that highlights likely removable filler words.
Add a seasonal-word prompt library without claiming automatic detection.
Add manual syllable overrides for ambiguous words.
Add a craft checklist after the structural pass: image, season, contrast, cut.
word-counter: Expose the exact reading and speaking WPM assumptions in the UI.
Add adjustable reading-speed and speaking-speed controls.
Add export/copy for the full stats panel.
Add platform presets for meta descriptions, social posts, and ad copy.
Add a script mode with target duration and words-to-cut guidance.

recommended_new_articles.title: How to Write a Rhyming Poem — Meaning, Sound, Rhythm, and Revision
recommended_new_articles.h1: How to Write a Rhyming Poem
recommended_new_articles.why_add: Captures the user intent behind the Rhyme Finder: not just finding a rhyming word, but finishing a better poem.
proposed_outline: Start with one subject or moment
Choose a rhyme scheme that fits the tone
Write the idea before searching for rhymes

schema_recommendations.issue: No explicit field separates true tool capabilities from broader educational concepts.
schema_recommendations.fix: Add content_claim_scope with values such as tool_capability, educational_context, and future_enhancement.

schema_recommendations.issue: Brief said 1,200+ in goal but 800-1200 in longform rules.
schema_recommendations.fix: Pick one target: 900-1,300 words for support guides, 300-700 words for tool pages.
